---
title: "Lobster"
author: "Jessie"
format: html
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data


```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```


```{r}
lobster_abundance <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20240411.csv")) %>%
    janitor::clean_names()
```


```{r}
unique(lobster_abundance$size_mm)
lobster_abundance_v2 <- lobster_abundance %>% 
    mutate(size_mm = na_if(size_mm, -99999.0))
head(lobster_abundance_v2)
```


```{r}
lobster_nonapl <- lobster_abundance_v2 %>% 
    filter(site != "NAPL")
unique(lobster_nonapl$site)
```


```{r}

```
